title: Bulk Actions aria-busy, Form Error Linkage & Card Keyboard Access
description: Wire aria-busy to ApplicationRowActions bulk action buttons so screen readers announce loading states, add id/aria-describedby to NewEventFormFields and OfferEditableCell validation error messages, add aria-hidden to DetailPanelBody ExternalLink decorative icon, add text-warning design token to ApplicationRowActions limit warning, and add keyboard accessibility to JobCard clickable article element.

userStories.title: Add aria-describedby to NewEventFormFields date input for form error
userStories.description:
NewEventFormFields.jsx renders a formError message in a

element (~line 50) but it has no id and no role='alert'. The Date input and other fields do not reference this error via aria-describedby. Add id='event-form-error' to the error

and role='alert' to announce it. Add aria-describedby={formError ? 'event-form-error' : undefined} to the date input since date validation is the most common trigger.
acceptanceCriteria:
NewEventFormFields.jsx error

has id='event-form-error' and role='alert'
The date input has aria-describedby='event-form-error' when formError is non-null

userStories.title: Add aria-describedby and aria-invalid to OfferEditableCell editing input
userStories.description:
OfferEditableCell.jsx renders a validationError in a

(~line 75) but the error paragraph has no id. The editing input element lacks aria-invalid and aria-describedby. Add id='offer-cell-error-{fieldType}' to the error paragraph and add aria-invalid={!!validationError} and aria-describedby={validationError ? `offer-cell-error-${fieldType}` : undefined} to the editing input element.
acceptanceCriteria: OfferEditableCell.jsx error paragraph has a unique id referencing fieldType
Editing input has aria-invalid when validationError is non-null
Editing input has aria-describedby pointing to the error paragraph when error exists

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to ApplicationRowActions Move button when loading
userStories.description: ApplicationRowActions.jsx Move to stage button (~line 130) shows a Loader2 spinner when isMoving is true but lacks aria-busy. Screen readers do not announce the loading state. Add aria-busy={isMoving} to the Move action button (the SelectTrigger or wrapper button element) so assistive technologies announce that an action is in progress.

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to ApplicationRowActions Edit and Merge buttons when loading
userStories.description: ApplicationRowActions.jsx Apply/Edit button (~line 150) shows Loader2 when isEditing but has no aria-busy. The Merge button (~line 163) shows Loader2 when isMerging but has no aria-busy. Add aria-busy={isEditing} to the Apply bulk-edit Button and aria-busy={isMerging} to the Merge duplicates Button.

userStories.title: Add aria-busy to ApplicationRowActions Delete button when loading
userStories.description: ApplicationRowActions.jsx Delete selected button (~line 167) shows Loader2 when isDeleting but has no aria-busy attribute. Add aria-busy={isDeleting} to the Delete selected Button so screen readers announce the delete operation is in progress.
acceptanceCriteria: ApplicationRowActions.jsx Delete selected Button has aria-busy={isDeleting}

userStories.title: Replace ApplicationRowActions bulk limit warning amber text with text-warning token
userStories.description: ApplicationRowActions.jsx (~line 208) renders an overLimit warning span with 'text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400'. The project uses a `warning` design token. Replace 'text-amber-700 dark:text-amber-400' with 'text-warning' on the overLimit warning span.
acceptanceCriteria: ApplicationRowActions.jsx overLimit span uses text-warning instead of amber classes

userStories.title: Add aria-hidden to DetailPanelBody ExternalLink decorative icon
userStories.description: DetailPanelBody.jsx renders a job posting link (~line 152) as . The ExternalLink icon inside this anchor lacks aria-hidden='true'. Since the anchor already has aria-label='Job posting', the icon is decorative and should be hidden. Add aria-hidden='true' to the ExternalLink icon.
acceptanceCriteria: DetailPanelBody.jsx ExternalLink icon inside job posting link has aria-hidden='true'

userStories.title: Add keyboard accessibility to JobCard clickable article element
userStories.description: JobCard.jsx renders an <article> element with onClick to select the job (~line 19-22), but the article lacks tabIndex={0} and a keyboard handler, making it unreachable via keyboard. Add tabIndex={0}, onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter' || e.key === ' ') { e.preventDefault(); onSelect?.(job); } }}, and aria-label={`View details for ${job.role ?? 'role'} at ${job.company ?? 'company'}`} to the article element.
acceptanceCriteria: Article has onKeyDown handler triggering onSelect on Enter or Space
Article has a descriptive aria-label including role and company
